text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I arrive at the cafeteria for lunch, I see Air
Groove speaking with some students.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
I think my hamburger steak came out pretty good
today. What do you think, Air Groove?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You've improved since last time. However, the
sauce could do with a little less salt.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
If you're going to flavor the meat itself with
seasonings, a milder sauce would complement it
better.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
That totally makes sense! Thanks so much! The
next one will blow your socks off, promise!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I don't doubt it—you've made impressive progress
already. Keep up the good work.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The student walks off with a beaming smile.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I was sampling her cooking. It seems my honest
critique is of some use to her.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure when it started, but students
sometimes bring me their home-made lunches to
try.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A number of lunchboxes lie in front of Air
Groove.
choice_data_list: You're going to try all of those?
You're going to try all of those?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hmm... I see what you're getting at.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
But I can't turn down their requests. And besides,
this isn't an impossible amount to eat.
choice_data_list: It looks like way too much to me.

I guess you don't have to worry about going
hungry.

I guess you don't have to worry about going
hungry.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
But I can't turn down their requests. And besides,
this isn't an impossible amount to eat.
choice_data_list: It looks like way too much to me.

I guess you don't have to worry about going
hungry.

I guess you don't have to worry about going
hungry.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Yes, but I can't just return them without doing
what I promised...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: This really is none of your concern.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I've made my bed. If I must apologize, I'll do it
myself.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: But... you have my thanks, nonetheless.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove goes around the cafeteria returning
each lunchbox to its owner, apologizing as she
does so.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I don't do this for the free meals. I enjoy helping
them.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Whether it's training or cooking, I always respect
the desire to improve at something.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
It's only natural, considering I'm older than them.
Nothing worth boasting about.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Now, which do I eat first?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though Air Groove turns away dismissively,
there's a note of kindness in her expression as she
begins sampling the lunches.
